TestCaseInfo.TestDescription: Verify that invalid value for "devices.network.host_network_type" (peripheral device) device gives appropriate error message.
TestCaseInfo.TestCaseHeader: Verify that invalid value for "devices.network.host_network_type" (peripheral device) device gives appropriate error message.

VerifyMessage.MessageText: TLP Pro 1230WTG - network.host_network_type: Invalid - Valid values include "LAN", "AVLAN", "OOB", "NAV" e.g. "host_network_type": "LAN"
TLP Pro 300M - network.host_network_type: Invalid - Valid values include "LAN", "AVLAN", "OOB", "NAV" e.g. "host_network_type": "LAN"
TLI Pro 201 - network.host_network_type: Invalid - Valid values include "LAN", "AVLAN", "OOB", "NAV" e.g. "host_network_type": "LAN"

TestCaseInfo.TestDescription: Verify that invalid "devices.network.host_network_type" (not a string) for peripheral device gives appropriate error message.
TestCaseInfo.TestCaseHeader: Verify that invalid "devices.network.host_network_type" (not a string) for peripheral device gives appropriate error message.

VerifyMessage.MessageText: TLP Pro 1230WTG - network.host_network_type: Invalid - Must be a string e.g. "host_network_type": "LAN"
TLP Pro 300M - network.host_network_type: Invalid - Must be a string e.g. "host_network_type": "LAN"
TLI Pro 201 - network.host_network_type: Invalid - Must be a string e.g. "host_network_type": "LAN"

TestCaseInfo.TestDescription: Verify that more than 128 characters in "devices.name"(Peripheral Device ) in destiny gives appropriate error message.
TestCaseInfo.TestCaseHeader: Verify that more than 128 characters in "devices.name"(Peripheral Device ) in destiny gives appropriate error message.
